purpose: Public-response-shape no-data-loss gate per CLAUDE.md '## Verification gate patterns' + Plan-Mode Amendment C. Future commits touching /api/erc-8004-reputation MUST diff against this snapshot before deploy. ANY new key requires a NEW dated snapshot file (never mutate this one); ANY removal of a key requires consumer-audit. Path-3 'pending' shape is locked here — when ERC-8004-W2 lands attestation, a NEW snapshot ships with score/total_attestations as integers + status='active'.
path_mode: Path 3 (DEFERRED) per Plan-Mode 0.E ratification — attestation pipeline rolling out in ERC-8004-W2 when canonical mainnet ValidationRegistry deploys

response_top_level.agent_id_source: process.env.ERC8004_AGENT_ID (env-pinned by register-erc8004-agent.ts; agentId 44544 on Base mainnet as of 2026-05-16)
response_top_level.first_registered_at_source: process.env.ERC8004_FIRST_REGISTERED_AT (env-pinned by register-erc8004-agent.ts; 2026-04-12T08:57:21Z = original mint timestamp preserved across the --update-uri pivot)

agent_id.note: uint256-as-string; null only if ERC8004_AGENT_ID env unset

identity_registry.note: EIP-55-checksummed Base mainnet address; canonical across all 24+ chain deployments per erc-8004/erc-8004-contracts README

attestation_registry.note: null under Path 3; ERC-8004-W2 will populate either Reputation Registry (0x8004BAa17C55a88189AE136b182e5fdA19dE9b63) or Validation Registry address once canonical mainnet deployment ships

status.note: 'pending' under Path 3; 'active' when ERC-8004-W2 wires attestation aggregation

status_message.current_value: Identity verified on-chain via ERC-8004 Identity Registry. Attestation pipeline rolling out — interim verification via /api/merkle-batches.

basescan_url.note: null only if ERC8004_AGENT_ID env unset

freshness_seconds.note: elapsed seconds since cache entry was created (0..300); recomputed at each serve, not cached

forbidden_rationale: Data Integrity LAW + Plan-Mode Amendment C. outcome_return_pct / Phase-E numbers are internal-only to AlgoVault's quant engine — never expose via MCP or any public surface (CLAUDE.md ## Data Integrity 'Outcome WR is internal only'). Private-key shapes never appear in any public response.

error_contract.500: {"error": "Failed to load erc-8004 reputation"} — generic catch-all, no internal-state leak

cache_contract.scope: module-level (single in-memory cache shared across all requests on this process; not per-request)
cache_contract.invalidation: TTL-only; no explicit invalidation API (body is env-driven + path-3 static, so cache miss on TTL expiry is fine)

consumers.hydration: client-side fetch (DOMContentLoaded) → populate data-tr-field=erc8004_agent_id span + Basescan deep link

consumers.fields_read: n/a (static markdown; refetch on each docs review)
all keys; expected to consume canonical shape going forward

drift_check_command: curl -s https://api.algovault.com/api/erc-8004-reputation | jq -e 'has("agent_id") and has("identity_registry") and (.identity_registry == "0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432") and (.chain_id == 8453) and (.score == null) and (.status == "pending") and (.attestation_registry == null) and has("basescan_url") and has("_algovault") and (._algovault.endpoint_version == "v1") and ([.outcome_return_pct, .outcome_price, .phase_e_wr, .phase_e_won] | all(. == null))' > /dev/null && echo DRIFT_CHECK_OK || echo DRIFT_CHECK_FAIL
drift_check_lock_semantics: Locks the Path-3 'pending' shape per Plan-Mode Amendment C: score===null AND status==='pending' AND attestation_registry===null. ERC-8004-W2 will ship a NEW dated snapshot file (audits/api-erc-8004-reputation-shape-snapshot-<W2 date>.json) with the active-attestation shape; THIS file is preserved unmutated for historical lineage.
